mac 1 28g (1 oz) mac1 short for “miracle alien cookies” is a popular and potent cannabis strain known for its impressive combination of flavors and effects. this hybrid strain bred by capulator is the result of crossing alien cookies f2 with miracle 15. mac1 is celebrated for its visually striking appearance featuring vibrant green and purple buds with orange hairs and a dense coating of crystal trichomes. the aroma and flavor profile of mac1 are highly distinctive offering a sweet and sour combination with notes of citrus spice and earthiness. users often report a smooth and enjoyable smoke or vapor experience. in terms of effects mac1 is renowned for its powerful cerebral and physical high. it typically induces a euphoric and uplifting sensation promoting creativity and social interaction. simultaneously it offers a relaxing and calming body buzz making it a well balanced choice for both recreational and medicinal users. flower hybrid type 1 flow gardens
